General.Name: Tasty Concepts Holding
General.Description: Tasty Concepts Holding Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in the operation of restaurants in Hong Kong and Macau. The company operates Japanese ramen and Hong Kong style restaurants; sells food and related products; and provides catering services. It also engages in trademark holding and licensing activities. Tasty Concepts Holding Limited was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Central, Hong Kong.
